title: Defer Grafana behind Beszel monitoring pilot
goal: Keep Grafana as a deferred observability option and re-evaluate it only after the Beszel monitoring pilot proves whether a heavier dashboard stack is actually needed.

acceptance.assertion: Beszel is evaluated first for Heim-PC/service monitoring before any Grafana install path is reopened.
Grafana, if ever used, is dashboard/observability only and cannot own task truth, runtime truth, approvals, PR state, deploy state or command authority.
The live port-3000 conflict is resolved by a documented alternate bind/route plan before any Grafana installation.
A later install task is blocked until boundary doc, rollback path and smoke checks are reviewed.

metadata.source_request: grafana, n8n, bitwarden ins visier nehmen
metadata.live_risk: Grafana default port 3000 conflicts with an existing listener on heim-pc.
metadata.decision_update: Beszel is the preferred first monitoring tool for UTIL-BASE-V1; Grafana remains deferred and non-authoritative.
